content: Fix lib.rs duplicate gpu module declaration
Fix gpu.rs for wgpu 29 API (InstanceDescriptor, DeviceDescriptor, CurrentSurfaceTexture, multiview_mask)
Fix PtyError → io::Error conversion in window.rs
Add cursor_visible() to Terminal + cursor_state() to App
Create gpu.rs: GpuContext + init_wgpu + render_frame (compiles clean with --features desktop)
Rewrite window.rs: winit ApplicationHandler + GPU render loop
